name: DYING UNDER NIGHTFALL
short_description: Get ready to prove your skills and face the challenge in our thrilling jump and run game. Will you dare to conquer the impossible? Jump in and find out! This is a small one-person project.
detailed_description:
Evade cunning traps and race against the clock to conquer each level. Time is your greatest adversary, as you must master precision and speed to survive. But beware, one wrong move means instant demise, and there are not many chances in this unforgiving world.

Prepare to be challenged like never before, as our game takes inspiration from the punishing difficulty of Dark Souls. With its relentless difficulty curve and merciless gameplay, every victory is earned through sweat, tears, and sheer perseverance.

Get ready to prove your skills and face the challenge in our thrilling jump and run game. Will you dare to conquer the impossible? Jump in and find out!

Jump your way through danger in this action platformer!

Game Features

- Lots of levels
- Points for every second!
- fast movement!
- Lots of achievements!
- Challenge yourself!
